emails.subject: Front End Developer Application - Ajay Kumar
emails.body:
Hi,

I was really interested to see Exact Solutions is building scalable web applications, and that experience with API integrations is a plus – that aligns well with my background. Over the past 2.6 years, I’ve focused on building full-stack MERN applications, and have become proficient with React.js and Next.js for creating dynamic user interfaces. I’ve also used TypeScript extensively to ensure code quality and maintainability, and have experience with Node.js for backend development. I’m confident my skills in these areas would be a great fit for your team. 

I’ve attached my resume for your review, which details my experience further. I’d be very keen to discuss how I can contribute to Exact Solutions.

Current CTC: 6 LPA | Expected CTC: 12-15 LPA

Regards,
Ajay Kumar

emails.subject: Next.js Developer Application - Ajay Kumar
emails.body:
Hi,

I came across the Next.js Developer position at Webkul and was excited to see you’re building scalable ecommerce applications. I’ve been working as a full-stack developer for 2.6 years, and have gained significant experience with React.js and Next.js, building and deploying web applications. I’m also comfortable with TypeScript, which I’ve used to develop robust and well-typed components, and I’m familiar with Tailwind CSS for creating responsive and visually appealing designs. 

I’ve attached my resume for a more detailed look at my qualifications. I’m very interested in learning more about this opportunity at Webkul and discussing how my skills can benefit your team.

Current CTC: 6 LPA | Expected CTC: 12-15 LPA

Regards,
Ajay Kumar
